sections.paragraph: ἅπαξ λεγόμ. Ezr 6:4 Chald. a series of stones, or a wall, both of which significations are found in the Targums (Eze. 46:33; Zec 4:10), and in the Mishnah (t. i. page 7, 8; v. page 361; vi. p. 107, Surenh.) It seems to be derived from the Heb. נִדְבָּק part. Niph. prop. joined together, cleaving together.
